sections.markdown:
- Activity: Bay Run w/ Cassi
- Started: 2025-01-18 16:11
- Distance: 6.8 km
- Moving time: 43:24
- Elapsed time: 43:30
- Elevation gain: 52.8 m
- Average heart rate: 171.1 bpm
- Max heart rate: 188 bpm
- Average speed: 9.4 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `3` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `175.0 bpm`, ranging from `167.7` to `181.0 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `161.8 spm`, with a working range of `158.4` to `163.3 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `161.0 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `162.7 spm` (+1.7 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `6:23 /km` across `6.805 km` in `43:24` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `6:45 /km` and second-half pace was `6:00 /km` (-45 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `171.1 bpm` average and `188 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `167.3 bpm` in the first half and `175.4 bpm` in the second (+8.1 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `43:24` out of `43:30` elapsed (99.8%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `3` stop segments and `0.3%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `70.8 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `2.8 m` and `19.6 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `35.2 m` in the first half and `35.6 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
